actionCard.discussionForumTitle: Title and abstract sourced from gov.tools proposal-discussion forum (no on-chain anchor)
actionCard.hashMismatchTitle: The on-chain anchor hash doesn't match the served content. The content is shown for reference but its integrity cannot be cryptographically verified.
actionCard.metadataUnavailableTitle: The on-chain anchor exists but its body could not be retrieved from any public IPFS gateway.

guest.title: DRep Coordination Platform
guest.subtitle: Transparent, community-driven governance coordination for Cardano delegators and DReps. Follow governance actions, participate in discussions, and hold your representatives accountable.
guest.card1Desc: Follow active proposals from parameter changes to treasury withdrawals, all synced from the chain.
guest.card2Desc: Comment on proposals, see how your DRep plans to vote, and participate in the delegator clubhouse.
guest.card3Desc: Get your delegation history, see epoch deadlines, and never miss an important vote.

committee.pageIntro: Committees let a lead DRep and their members deliberate on each governance action, vote with a count-based X of N rule, author a shared rationale, and submit the vote on-chain.
committee.guestPrompt: Connect your wallet (top-right) to register a DRep committee or join one.
committee.notDrepTitle: You're not yet a registered DRep
committee.notDrepBody: Only registered DReps can form a committee. Link your wallet to your registered DRep on your profile, then come back here to establish a committee.
committee.notDrepLink: Link your DRep on your profile →
committee.isDrepBody: Your wallet is linked to a registered DRep. You can establish a committee to deliberate and vote on governance actions with members you choose.

wizard.membersCountLabel: How many members will the committee have?
wizard.errorChairInRows: You typed your own address as a member. You're already member #1 — remove it from the list below.
wizard.errorDuplicates: Two of the addresses you typed resolve to the same wallet. Each member must be distinct.
wizard.tipBody: a "Not active" address just means that wallet hasn't signed into the platform yet. You can still add them — invite them to sign in so they can participate.
wizard.invalidAddress: Not a valid Cardano payment or stake address.
wizard.thresholdQuestion: How many of the {{count}} members must vote Agree for a governance action to be Committee Approved?
wizard.thresholdNoLowerBar: Abstentions and disagreements simply aren't Agree votes — they don't lower the bar.
wizard.thresholdRestate: Adding or removing a member later will require restating this rule.
wizard.confirmRuleBody: {{x}} of {{n}} members must vote Agree for Committee Approved.
wizard.testEnvBody: — on-chain vote submission is disabled here; votes must be submitted from production.
wizard.submitErrorFallback: Could not create the committee. Please double-check the addresses and try again.

created.title: Committee created ✓
created.bodySuffix: (top-right) to activate your lead-DRep role, then manage members and open proposals.

faq.title: How committees work
faq.a1: Only a wallet that is already linked to a registered DRep. If you're not a registered DRep yet, link your DRep on your profile first — your committee will then bind to your DRep, so all of its on-chain votes are cast as the DRep you control.
faq.a2: You are. The Chair (the lead DRep forming the committee) is automatically added as the first member. You then add the rest by Cardano address.
faq.q3: How do I add the other members?
faq.a3: By their Cardano address — either a payment address (addr1…) or a stake address (stake1…). The platform stores everyone by their canonical stake identity, so two different payment addresses for the same wallet resolve to the same person.
faq.q4: What's the difference between "Active" and "Not active"?
faq.a4: "Active" means that wallet has signed into the platform before, so they can immediately participate. "Not active" just means we haven't seen them sign in — you can still add them. Invite them to sign in so they can cast votes and edit rationales.
faq.a5: X is how many of your N members must vote Agree for a governance action to be Committee Approved. For example, "3 of 5" means at least 3 of your 5 members have to vote Agree before you can close the proposal as passed. Abstentions and disagreements don't lower the bar — only Agree votes count toward X.
faq.q6: Why do I have to restate "X of N" when adding or removing a member?
faq.a6: Because N changes. A "3 of 5" rule isn't meaningful if N drops to 4 — you might want 3 of 4, or 2 of 4, or unanimous. Every membership change requires you to consciously restate the rule so the consensus model never silently drifts.
faq.a7: Three members, including you. A committee with fewer members isn't a committee — that's a single DRep with extra steps.
faq.q8: Does anything happen on-chain in this environment?
faq.a8: No. This is the TEST environment — on-chain vote submission is disabled here. Everything else (proposals, voting, rationale, member changes) works exactly as in production, so you can practice the full flow without spending ada.

invitations.explainer: A committee Chair has invited your wallet to join. Accept to become a voting member; reject if you don't want to participate.
invitations.acceptedToast: Invitation accepted — you're now a committee member.
invitations.autoDeclineHelp: When enabled, any NEW invitation issued to your wallet is auto-declined at creation. Existing pending invitations are NOT affected — use the button below to decline those.

clubhouse.title: Delegator Clubhouse
clubhouse.intro: A space for delegators to ask questions, share ideas, and help shape Cardano governance together with their DRep.

gate.signIn: Sign in to post in this clubhouse.
gate.connectDelegated: Connect a wallet delegated to {{name}} to post in this clubhouse.

clubhouse.emptyPosts: No posts yet. Be the first to start the conversation.

tooltip.governanceFeedBadge: Auto-generated by drep.tools when this governance action was first detected
tooltip.pinned: Pinned until this governance action completes
tooltip.noLongerDelegated: This wallet is no longer delegated to this DRep. The comment is preserved for context.

landing.notDelegated: You aren't delegated to a DRep yet. Browse the directory to find one and join their clubhouse.
landing.guest: Connect a wallet that delegates to a DRep to enter their private clubhouse.

list.title: Committee proposals
list.proposeHelp: Pick an open governance action and the position you want the group to consider. Members then vote Agree / Disagree / Abstain. No signature needed to open a proposal.
list.actionsEmpty: No open governance actions to propose right now.
list.actionsMoreNote: Showing the {{count}} most recent open actions.

room.notFound: No proposal found for this governance action yet.
room.testBanner: TEST environment — connected to mainnet for read-only validation. On-chain vote submission is disabled here; votes must be submitted from production.
room.actionLine: Action {{actionId}} · proposed by {{proposer}} · needs {{x}} of {{n}} Agree (X of N)
room.approved: Committee Approved — any member may close it as passed.
room.notApproved_one: Not yet approved — {{count}} more Agree vote needed.
room.notApproved_other: Not yet approved — {{count}} more Agree votes needed.
room.closeLockedHint: "Close as passed" unlocks once {{x}} of {{n}} members have voted Agree (Committee Approved).
room.resolveLimited: Close-as-failed and withdraw are limited to the proposer or the lead DRep.
room.rationaleHelp: A rationale must be authored and finalized before the vote is submitted on-chain.

cast.help: Each vote is signed with your wallet — expect a signature prompt. You can change your vote until the proposal is closed.
cast.error: Could not record your vote. Please try again.

submit.title: Submit on-chain
submit.overrideLabel: Proceed even without a finalized rationale (discouraged)
submit.testDisabled: On a test environment, broadcasting and recording are disabled. Promote to production to submit.

testWarning.title: test.drep.tools submits to MAINNET
testWarning.body: Broadcasting from this page casts a REAL DRep vote on the live governance action and spends real ADA. There is no preview/preprod path — every successful submission is permanent and visible on Cardanoscan and gov.tools.
testWarning.acknowledge: I understand this is a real mainnet vote.

committeeSubmit.notAvailable: On-chain submission isn't available for your account yet.

errors.noWalletName: Wallet identity not retained from your last login. Please disconnect and re-connect your wallet, then try again.
errors.lowBalance: Your wallet has less than ~0.5 ADA. The vote transaction needs ada for the fee — top up before broadcasting or the wallet will refuse to sign.
errors.declined: Wallet declined the signature — vote not cast.
errors.receiptFailed: The vote was broadcast (txHash {{txHash}}) but the platform failed to record the receipt: {{message}}. Save the txHash and contact a platform admin.

roster.approvalRule: Approval rule: {{x}} of {{n}} members must vote Agree for Committee Approved.
roster.removalNotice: Removing this member leaves {{n}} members. Restate the approval rule for the new committee size:
roster.addHelp: Adding a member changes N to {{n}}, so you must restate the X-of-N rule. The address can be a payment address (addr1…) or stake address (stake1…). "Not active" addresses are still addable — they just need to be invited to sign in.

addStatus.invalid: Not a valid Cardano payment or stake address.
addStatus.alreadyMember: This address is already a member of the committee.
addStatus.notActive: ✗ Not active — they'll need to sign in

other.title: Other settings
other.ipfsNone: No key stored. Recommended: a Blockfrost IPFS project id.

dashboard.delegatorSubtitle: Track active governance, follow your DRep, and weigh in on proposals you care about.
dashboard.drepSubtitle: Review active governance, track your committee's positions, and respond to delegators.
dashboard.noActiveActions: No active governance actions right now.

governanceList.title: Governance Actions
governanceList.subtitle: Live from the Cardano mainnet. Updated every minute.

activity.notVotedThisEpoch: You haven't voted this epoch yet
activity.walletRequired: Wallet must be connected to track

drepDirectory.title: DReps
drepDirectory.subtitle: Every registered Cardano DRep, with bios from their CIP-119 anchor metadata.
drepDirectory.showInactiveTitle: Inactive DReps haven't voted in ~100 days; retired DReps have filed a retirement certificate. Voting power for both is excluded from the active stake denominator.
drepDirectory.neverVotedTitle: This DRep has never cast a vote
drepDirectory.emptyNoSync: No DReps found. The directory may still be syncing — check back shortly.

status.predefinedTitle: A built-in Cardano DRep used for auto-vote delegations. These pseudo-identities are not registered like normal DReps but hold significant voting power.
status.retiredTitle: This DRep has filed a retirement certificate. They cannot vote and their voting power is zero.
status.inactiveTitle: No vote in the last drepActivity epochs (~100 days). Voting power is excluded from the active stake denominator until they vote again.

drepProfile.predefinedAbstain: Stake delegated here is recorded as 'Abstain' on every governance action. Abstain stake is excluded from the active voting denominator under CIP-1694.
drepProfile.predefinedNoConfidence: Stake delegated here is recorded as 'No' on most governance actions, and 'Yes' on No-Confidence motions. It counts toward the active voting denominator.

recentVotes.title: Recent votes
recentVotes.predefinedNote: Predefined DReps don't have an individual voting history. Their auto-vote is applied at ratification time to every applicable governance action.
recentVotes.noVotes: This DRep has not voted on any actions yet.
recentVotes.unavailable: Voting history is unavailable right now. Try again in a moment.

status.predefinedTitle: A built-in Cardano DRep used for auto-vote delegations. Not a registered DRep — protocol primitive.
status.delegatedTitleDays: Cardano epochs are ~5 days each — roughly {{days}} days delegated
status.delegatedTitle: Your wallet is currently delegated to this DRep

drepLink.heading: Are you a DRep?
drepLink.linked: ✓ Linked to your DRep. You're recognized as a DRep across the platform.
drepLink.linkedWithName: ✓ Linked to your DRep — {{name}}. You're recognized as a DRep across the platform.
drepLink.explainer: Link your registered DRep to be recognized as one (no committee needed). Your name defaults to your DRep name unless you set one above.
drepLink.cip95Note: Linking uses CIP-95 proof-of-control — your wallet will ask you to sign a one-time message with your DRep key. No on-chain transaction or fees.
drepLink.noKeyError: This wallet did not return a DRep key. Make sure your wallet has a registered DRep, and that you're using a CIP-95-capable build (recent Eternl, Lace, or Nufi).
drepLink.readKeyError: Could not read your DRep key.

walletConnect.title: Connect Your Wallet
walletConnect.intro: Connect a CIP-30 compatible Cardano wallet (Nami, Eternl, Flint, or Typhon) to authenticate with the DRep Coordination Platform.
walletConnect.gasless: Signing in is gasless and does not trigger any blockchain transaction.
walletConnect.signatureUse: Your wallet signature is used only to verify wallet ownership.

safetyMode.title: Sybil safety mode
safetyMode.description: While active, wallets newer than 7 days can't create a committee. Auto-clears after 72h.

rationales.title: Rationales
rationales.para1: Each committee authors a rationale per governance action; once finalized it carries a CIP-100/108 anchor hash and (after pinning) an IPFS URI embedded in the on-chain vote.
rationales.toSee: to see the associated proposal and rationale.

rationaleEditor.title: Rationale
rationaleEditor.finalizeHelp: Finalizing locks the rationale and computes its anchor hash. Required before the on-chain vote. Lead or proposer only.
rationaleEditor.ipfsKeyPromptBody: To pin this rationale to IPFS, add a Blockfrost IPFS project id. It's free: create a project at blockfrost.io, choose the IPFS network, and copy the project id. The key is stored encrypted for this committee, so you only do this once — future pins are one click.
rationaleEditor.ipfsKeyGetLink: Get a free project id at blockfrost.io ↗
rationaleEditor.ipfsKeySettingsHint: You can also manage this key in committee settings.

comingSoon.defaultDescription: This surface is part of the roadmap and will be available shortly.

roleGuard.needRole: You need one of the following roles to access this page:

governanceAction.tallyPendingBody: This action has not been re-enriched with on-chain vote data yet.
governanceAction.noRationale: No rationale published for this action.
governanceAction.clubhouseBody: Per-DRep clubhouse threads tied to this governance action will land in a future release. For now, public discussion happens in the Public Comments tab.

governanceHistory.title: Governance History
governanceHistory.intro: Every governance action ever submitted to Cardano mainnet, sorted by submission time. Reference for governance researchers and DReps.
governanceHistory.treasuryWithdrawnCaption: Sum of enacted Treasury Withdrawals only.
governanceHistory.emptyState: No governance actions match the current filters.

sentiment.noBodies: No governance bodies are called to vote on this action.
sentiment.notInDenominator: Not part of the ratification denominator.

comments.cantVoteOwn: You can't vote on your own comment
comments.emptyState: No comments yet. Be the first to share your perspective.
comments.connectToComment: Connect your wallet to leave a comment.
comments.reconnectFull: Re-connect required. Posting comments now requires a fresh wallet signature. Please disconnect your wallet from the top bar, reconnect it, then come back here.
comments.commentPlaceholder: Share your perspective on this governance action…
comments.signatureNote: Posting requires a fresh wallet signature. Your wallet will prompt you to sign a one-time message — this does not cost any fees and does not broadcast a transaction.

castVote.title: Cast your vote
castVote.rationalePlaceholder: Why are you voting this way? Your delegators may see this.
castVote.reminder: Voting requires a fresh wallet signature. On-chain submission lands in an upcoming phase — for now your choice is recorded locally and toast-confirmed.
castVote.recordedDescription: Your choice has been recorded locally — on-chain submission coming in the next phase.

share.title: Share proposal
share.description: Anyone with this link can view the proposal page and public comments.
share.discordNote: Discord: copies a formatted snippet you can paste into any channel.
share.discordCopiedDescription: Paste it into a Discord channel.

votesTab.powerApproxTooltip: Current power; historical snapshot unavailable for this vote’s epoch
